texto: Judy's friend that she has known the longest has just broken up with her boyfriend and is depressed. Judy likes her more now that she is depressed and feels unmotivated in life. Judy feels unmotivated in life.
explicacao: Citação de Ellen Kennedy sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Judy's friend that she has known the longest has just broken up with her boyfriend and is depress…” articula motivacao, depressed, depression em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como termino e depression.

texto: i don't want to hate the presidenti don't want to go to harvardi don't want to win the pulitzer prizei just want to sit in my bathtuband think about relationships i will never havewith people i will never meetand then go lay in my bedwith a magnifying glassand count all the stiches in my sheetsuntil i fall asleepand wake upto repeat again.
